allow: PowerShell(New-Item -Path "back\\controller\\UsuarioCrontroller.php" -ItemType File -Force | Out-Null; Get-Item "back\\controller\\UsuarioCrontroller.php" | Select-Object FullName, @{Name='SizeBytes';Expression={$_.Length}})

PowerShell(cd "C:\\xampp\\htdocs"; $filename = "BACKUP_carol_antes_portagem_$\(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'\).zip"; Compress-Archive -Path "Projeto-Integrador-Ciclo-II-crudtest" -DestinationPath $filename -Force; Get-Item $filename | Format-Table Name, @{Name='SizeMB';Expression={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Out-String)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\xampp\\htdocs"; $timestamp = \(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'\); $zipname = "BACKUP_carol_antes_portagem_$timestamp.zip"; Compress-Archive -Path ".\\Projeto-Integrador-Ciclo-II-crudtest" -DestinationPath $zipname -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Get-Item $zipname | Format-Table Name, @{Name='SizeMB';Expression={"{0:N2}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\)}}; Write-Host "✓ Backup criado: $zipname")

PowerShell(cd ..; $timestamp = \(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'\); $zipname = "BACKUP_carol_antes_portagem_$timestamp.zip"; Compress-Archive -Path "Projeto-Integrador-Ciclo-II-crudtest" -DestinationPath $zipname -Force; Get-Item $zipname | Format-List Name, @{Name='SizeMB';Expression={"{0:N2}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\)}}; Write-Host "✓ Backup criado com sucesso!")
